text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho, a decisive battle held<n>among the
shrines and temples of<n>Kyoto, is about to begin.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Despite never having raced 3,000<n>meters before,
Matikanefukukitaru<n>approaches the track with a
positive<n>attitude.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Leaving everything to fate and the<n>gods, she
takes on the hellishly long<n>race!
